title: Trump Just Used Wartime Powers to Pump $700 Million Into Coal
script: President Trump invoked the Defense Production Act to send 700 million dollars to U.S. coal companies. The same law that built tanks in World War II is now keeping aging coal plants alive. The White House says coal-fired power is vital to AI data centers and grid stability. 4 coal mines that had announced shutdowns are now back online. Environmental groups are suing within hours. The plants that get this money emit 3 times more carbon than natural gas plants.
